title: Hydriastele ledermanniana
taxonomy: Hydriastele ledermanniana is classified within the family Arecaceae, commonly known as the palm family. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics and morphology. It belongs to the genus Hydriastele, which is a group of palms native to the tropical regions of the Pacific and Asia. The species ledermanniana is specifically found in New Guinea. This classification helps in understanding the plant's evolutionary history and its relationships with other palm species.
